import { Link } from 'react-router-dom'; import './about-volunteer.css'; const values = [ ['01', 'Compassion first', 'We listen carefully, respond with dignity, and make every person feel seen.'], ['02', 'Community powered', 'Local voices lead the way from the first conversation to lasting change.'], ['03', 'Transparent action', 'We share progress openly so every contribution has a clear purpose.'], ]; export default function About() { return ( <> {/* ── Hero ───────────────────────────────────── */}
Our purpose

Small acts of care.
Lasting change.

The Arise '20 Foundation brings people together to create practical, hopeful change across Salem.

{/* ── Intro ─────────────────────────────────── */}
06 years of
community care
How it began

A belief that kindness becomes stronger when shared.

What started as a handful of friends responding to a local need has grown into a community of volunteers, donors, and partners who show up with consistency and heart.

We connect immediate support with opportunity—serving meals today while building confidence, health, and hope for tomorrow.

Join our movement →
{/* ── Purpose ───────────────────────────────── */}
What guides us

Every person deserves the chance to rise.

⌁

Our vision

A compassionate, empowered community where no one is left behind.

↗

Our mission

Deliver practical support and community-led programs that restore dignity and hope.

{/* ── Values ────────────────────────────────── */}
Our values

Care is how we work.

{values.map(([number, title, text]) => (
{number}

{title}

{text}

))}
{/* ── Impact ────────────────────────────────── */}
Impact in action

Purpose you can see in every neighbourhood.

1,500+ families supported
3,000+ meals served
500+ volunteers united
{/* ── CTA ───────────────────────────────────── */}
Make a difference

There is a place for you in this story.

Bring your time, talent, or contribution to the next act of care.

Donate now Volunteer with us
); }
